activities_projects.title: Grouped Frequency Table
steps: Collect data of marks of 30 students
Divide marks into intervals (0-10, 11-20, …)
Count number of students in each interval
Tabulate data as grouped frequency table
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct grouping and frequency count (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cumulative Frequency Table
activities_projects.objective: Create cumulative frequency table from grouped data
steps: Take grouped frequency table
Calculate cumulative frequency for each interval
Record cumulative values in a separate column

activities_projects.title: Draw Cumulative Frequency Graph (Ogive)
activities_projects.objective: Represent cumulative data visually using an ogive
steps: Take cumulative frequency table
Draw axes with marks intervals and cumulative frequency
Plot points and join them to draw smooth curve
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns to draw ogive for grouped data

activities_projects.title: Calculate Mean for Grouped Data
activities_projects.objective: Compute mean using class marks for grouped frequency table
steps: Take grouped frequency table
Find midpoints for each class interval
Multiply frequency by midpoint and sum all
Divide sum by total frequency to get mean
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies mean formula to grouped data

activities_projects.title: Find Median from Grouped Data
activities_projects.objective: Calculate median using cumulative frequency table
steps: Take cumulative frequency table
Identify median class where cumulative frequency crosses N/2
Use median formula: Median = L + [(N/2 – CF)/f] × h
Record median value
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands median calculation for grouped data

activities_projects.title: Find Mode from Grouped Data
activities_projects.objective: Calculate mode using grouped frequency table
steps: Identify modal class with highest frequency
Use formula: Mode = L + [(f1 – f0)/(2f1 – f0 – f2)] × h
Calculate and record mode
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands mode calculation for grouped data

activities_projects.title: Compare Two Cumulative Frequency Graphs
activities_projects.objective: Analyze data from two groups using ogives
steps: Take two sets of grouped data (e.g., class A and class B marks)
Draw cumulative frequency graphs for both
Compare median, range, and general distribution
Write observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Compares grouped data visually and analytically

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Data Collection and Tabulation
activities_projects.objective: Collect data from school or home and tabulate
steps: Collect data such as daily rainfall, shoe sizes, or hours of study
Organize data into intervals if necessary
Draw frequency and cumulative frequency tables
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies statistical methods to real-life data
activities_projects.evaluation: Proper collection, grouping, and tabulation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Draw Histogram for Grouped Data
steps: Take grouped frequency table
Draw axes with intervals and frequencies
Draw bars for each class interval with equal width
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct bar heights and intervals (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Interpret Data Observations
activities_projects.objective: Analyze grouped data to make conclusions
steps: Take grouped frequency table
Calculate mean, median, and mode
Observe trends or patterns
Write simple conclusions based on data
